Ms. Espey stated that she has spoken with her Client once since January, that she does not know what he is thinking or if he intends to fight this and that she can not participate in an evidentiary hearing with out a Client. In addition, Ms. Espey spoke of the inherent value in what Gregory did for his Mother before and after her death, an offset against what he is being charged and stated that there were two safe deposit boxes that may have a significant value in coins that have not been drilled. The matters were continued to July 18, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Espey to determine if she will remain on the case or file a motion to withdraw.
